channel.title: SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sexy Stars Eating Pizza For Pizza Day!
item.description: No deep-dish drama here ... just smiles, slices and hot shots that'll melt your heart out! It's Pizza Day, and we've got more than enough to share ......
